24:31 â September 6, 2024
Update to the Deposit Processing Part
We updated the Deposit Processing Part to reflect that Corporate Capture enrollments for business customers can take up to 10 business days for processing.
Clearing and Deposits Volume
Deposit Processing Part
Section 5.6, BC Employment and Assistance Cheques
We updated information that was missed in a previous update to this section. $3,000 maximum face values are applicable to Imprest cheques that are issued by the Ministry of Social Development and Poverty Reduction or by the Ministry of Children and Family Development.
Section 11.3, Enrolling Business Customers in Corporate Capture
We updated this section to inform you that enrollment requests can take up to 10 business days for processing once theyâre submitted to Central 1.
